19 June 2023 Online English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Programme 2022-2023 Academic Year Spring Semester Remotely Proctored Online DÜİYES Guidelines

Dear Students,

2022-2023 Fall Term English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered online on Monday, June 19, 2023 and will be remotely invigilated. The exam consists of two sessions and the students are required to attend both sessions.

The exam will be administered at 11:00 on

douonlineydb.dogus.edu.tr

.  Students are obliged to approve PDP INFORMATION and EXPLICIT CONSENT TEXT on the platform prior to the start of their exam. All students must be available in groups on Microsoft Teams where they were placed at

10.30 for the first session

and at

13.15 for the second session

. Students must have a valid ID with photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam.

Students who do not want to sit remotely-proctored online DÜİYES are able to take a face-to face invigilated exam without a camera and microphone in the Computer Laboratory Z-16 located in our Dudullu Campus. Those students must state their exam preferences by sending an e-mail to

[email protected]

address via their student e-mail address by 14:00 on June 16, 2023.

Students who do not state their preference to take the exam on Dudullu Campus with a written document until the stated deadline will be assumed to have preferred to sit the exam online with their camera and microphone turned on outside of the campus.

* Information about the exam will be mailed to the students on Friday, June 16, 2023.

*
